# Production readiness skill

Use this skill when reviewing operational readiness, deployment safety, or incident response.

## Checklist

- Confirm health probes, startup behavior, and graceful failure modes.
- Verify logs are structured and do not contain secrets.
- Define deployment smoke tests and rollback checks.
- Confirm Azure resources have least-privilege access and diagnostic settings.
- Document alerts, dashboards, and runbook steps before production launch.
